513138ca792339545d5d825f16fdb35f: A complete guide to managing your patient media files
957470c656b3088a0581a36deed9cb63: Kitview is a digital media library designed for orthodontic practices. It can be used to manage all types of multimedia files associated with patient records:
c127c7ddc98706ed6727e23c3774a91f: To create a new patient record in Kitview :

f1ae54501be2b21c765c08929a6089df: Templates can be used to automatically classify your photos using associated keywords. There are 3 steps to creating a custom template:

9dbb2d864a6d91909fb43f5bffdf0136: Fixed presentations can be used to automatically generate comparative views based on keywords associated with the photos. They are ideal for showing the progress of a treatment to patients or colleagues.
50de7776fd1616113cefff75b42a76b5: Overview with portrait, intra-oral and panoramic photos.
4f762788c1e244762416ad1ff7901e4f: Full view including profile and teleradiography.
eb519181016e142bfcee6c5102ef0eaf: Presentation of photos of dental casts.
6fbc24e47e5d5528e6cd3a75941b13d6: Three-step comparison to monitor treatment progress.
b0265e1e0a7bbcb36f79eb35dc181bcd: Each desktop is fully customisable. You can add, remove or move items as required.
a5b4b31c9f2495747380c96c31da6482: You can create your own fixed presentations with the thumbnails and keywords of your choice.
86b1ad344aa1719ac28987433037eb40: For a multiple selection, hold down Ctrl and click on each thumbnail, then use the alignment tools :
9dc33299583e40f864578a6ee4dc4613: Click on thedisk to save your presentation.
9f4e9f65a06783193c62421791b26b35: The slideshow displays all the photos in a patient file in full screen mode.
27a11c0aac0d4d700bc78803ec820893: If you want to display only certain photos, select them first and then click on "Slideshow".
e85592461e5cf2d7f0837708f830de1b: Kitview offers a number of tools for comparing photos and showing the evolution of a treatment.
cce55b6f074faa7fc1ec3ad53a0a5fdc: The comparator lets you compare several selected photos:
c4c357b743f228ce8d861a35380c9c8c: Use the arrows to scroll through the photos. The reference photo (left or top) remains frozen.
9f7d9303f8a30b497ba9e2e801fab59a: Photos are automatically scrolled by shooting date.
9191a1fc0048b4125ec67ecb7775a316: If you follow a precise protocol when taking photos, this feature allows you to compare sessions over time.
15dde7ec3e0db5188b788d555dd27b21: The photos of the first appointment remain static (at the top or on the left) and those of subsequent appointments scroll by date.
e35d69236490e29f058f38c8fb270b80: Kitview allows you to use mail templates with merge fields that automatically include patient information (surname, first name, address, photos, etc.).
4944ee4abe0d2fa6c41026cbfcfbd856: Switch to "Create" mode to view and modify the merge fields (e.g. <First name>, <Last name>, <Today's date>...).
a7236f8ac294bf41983033dd33a6cd37: The Portfolio can be used to group together photos of several patients and automatically generate a PowerPoint presentation.
a0d29f2c1870b3509719f03128b09d89: The presentation opens automatically in PowerPoint. You can then add text, change the page layout, etc.
1fdfd0e95c6ebe636e9830256b05a7b1: Population filters allow you to search by type of object or photo for one or more patients. Filters are organised by category.
2581ade44c5d32519b2f5f761130fe63: Population filters can also be used to search for photos taken on a specific date or within a date range.
24d69f653e1107d9ed5e4d437c2c098b: To view photos of each patient, click on each patient file.
4675c97321c82b119dc8225d83cdbd2e: Example:Search for all photos taken between 13/09/2017 and 13/09/2018.
602e2f3018e49800f930d0786ecf3913: Forms are used to store all the information relating to a patient, to provide rapid access to information, and to present and use the data entered.
b6717cbeabfed6065e6217d9e5232cde: A training support site is available to help you use Kitview. You'll find a number of explanatory videos and sample forms.
